message:
feat(engine): add deterministic support-bundle export to runtime diagnostics CLI

Implement a complete support-bundle export subsystem for the runtime
diagnostics CLI, enabling operators to produce self-contained,
redacted diagnostic bundles for incident triage and support workflows.

Library additions (runtime_diagnostics_cli.rs):
- SupportBundleRedactionPolicy: key-fragment-based sensitive field
  redaction with configurable replacement marker; defaults to redacting
  fields containing "secret", "token", "password", "credential",
  "private_key", or "signature"
- SupportBundleOutput/Index/File/FileIndexEntry structs for the
  complete bundle data model
- export_support_bundle(): collects diagnostics, applies redaction
  policy, emits deterministic bundle containing run_manifest.json,
  events.jsonl, commands.txt, runtime_diagnostics.json,
  evidence_records.jsonl, summary.md, and index.json
- render_support_bundle_summary(): human-readable summary output
- compute_support_bundle_id(): derives a stable bundle-id from the
  SHA-256 of all file content hashes for cross-reference

Binary additions (runtime_diagnostics):
- New 'support-bundle' subcommand with --out-dir and --redact-key
  flags, plus all existing diagnostic filter flags

Integration tests verify redaction correctness, file writing to temp
directories, and summary rendering consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
